Preferred_Parent.Parent_String: cocked hats [300210734], hats [300046106], headgear [300209285], accessories by location on the head [300211601], worn costume accessories [300209274], costume accessories [300209273], costume (mode of fashion) [300178802], Costume (hierarchy name) [300209261], Furnishings and Equipment (hierarchy name) [300264551], Objects Facet [300264092]

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: 19th-century name for cocked hats with the brim turned up to form three corners.
Nombre del siglo XIX para los sombreros apuntados con un ala vuelta hacia arriba para formar tres ángulos.
19e eeuwse naam voor steken waarvan de rand zo is opgeslagen dat er een gelijkzijdige driehoek wordt gevormd.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)

Descriptive_Note.Note_Text: 十九世紀的用詞，指帽緣翻起以形成三個角的捲邊帽。
Bezeichnung aus dem 19. Jahrhundert für einen spitzen Hut mit Krempe, die zu drei Ecken hochgebogen ist.

Source.Source_ID: 2000046682/Random House Dictionary of the English Language (1987)
